creator: swills@FreeBSD.org
text:
portlint says:

FATAL: PLIST_FILES: files cannot contain %%FOO%% variables.  Use make variables and logic instead

But that was there already and I'm not sure it's correct here, I'm just trying to update for now.

testport: OK (poduriere: 11.2, 12.0, and HEAD on amd64, default options tested)

"make test" results show:

39 failed, 598 passed, 36 skipped, 4 xfailed

which is almost exactly what the previous version (41.0.0) shows, except it had 37 failed. Not perfect, but I think it's OK.
